sections.paragraph:
Original: קיה קוא

Transliteration: qô' qâyâh

Phonetic: ko

BDB Definition:

  1. to vomit up, spue out, disgorge
    1. (Qal) to vomit
    2. (Hiphil) to vomit up
      1. of land spewing out its inhabitants (figuratively)
      2. vomiting, disgorging

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2014

Part(s) of speech: Verb
